title: Speedkeys
description: Adds keybinds that give you haste! NOT INTENDED FOR LONGTERM WORLDS/SERVERS, MEANT FOR CHALLENGES!
body:
Adds five keys that give many different levels of Haste:
1x Speed - Removes all Haste
2x Speed - Haste 5
5x Speed - Haste 20
10x Speed - Haste 45
100x Speed - Haste 495

Not meant to be used in servers/long worlds. Meant for challenge runs or short worlds that you don't want to spend hundreds of hours mining in.
(I made this for Skyblock!)

# Ports
If you want ports to any version, feel free to ask me!
Either on Discord, or make a GitHub issue. I will try my best to port to any requested version, and maybe even Forge if people want it.
